◆ iterativelySimplifyCFG()

bool iterativelySimplifyCFG ( Function & F,
const TargetTransformInfo & TTI,
const DataLayout * DL,
AssumptionCache * AC,
unsigned BonusInstThreshold )
static

iterativelySimplifyCFG - Call SimplifyCFG on all the blocks in the function, iterating until no more changes are made.

Definition at line 158 of file SimplifyCFGPass.cpp.

References Changed, F, and llvm::SimplifyCFG().

◆ mergeEmptyReturnBlocks()

bool mergeEmptyReturnBlocks ( Function & F)
static

mergeEmptyReturnBlocks - If we have more than one empty (other than phi node) return blocks, merge them together to promote recursive block merging.
